creator: thomas@bsdunix.ch
text:
Update to this issue. Nothing has changed :(

OS:
13.0-STABLE #0 stable/13-c595625ab amd64
smartpqi0@pci0:1:0:0:   class=0x010700 rev=0x01 hdr=0x00 vendor=0x9005 device=0x028f subvendor=0x9005 subdevice=0x0902
    vendor     = 'Adaptec'
    device     = 'Smart Storage PQI SAS'
    class      = mass storage
    subclass   = SAS

Firmware: 4.72

tested with freebsd included driver and with smartpqi_freebsd_v4170.0.1014.tgz. Both have the same outcome:
